<div class="package-hero"><div class="api-meta"><span class="api-badge node">Node: lru-cache</span></div><h1>cache</h1>
<p class="subtitle">Package cache provides an in-memory LRU cache with optional TTL per entry, similar to node-cache and lru-cache in Node.js. Node equivalent: node-cache, lru-cache</p><div class="import-line">import "github.com/sahilkhaire/gox/cache"</div></div>
## What's in this package

If you have used **lru-cache** in Node.js, this package is your starting point. Browse **2 documented symbols** below — each page includes Node.js, standard Go, and gox side-by-side examples.
